title: Everbuild 203 Premium Accelerator And Frostproofer | Accelerate Cement Setting Time and Provides Frost Protection for Concrete, Mortar and Rendering - 5 Litre (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Liquid additive formulated to accelerate setting and hardening times of mortar, concretes, screeds and rendering to provide frost protection during the setting period in cold weather.
Effective in sub-zero temperatures or can also be used in normal temperatures where a rapid set is required.
Can be used as a plugging admixture when mixed with neat cement. Suitable for use as an emergency repair plugging aid when mixed neat with cement.
Faster finishing times even in cold weather.Provides frost protection down to -8°C in wet mortar. Chloride free non corrosive formula. Optimises mould usage.
Concrete must be covered after placing until the minimum strength is obtained or until the temperature rises above freezing
description: From the manufacturer About Everbuild Everbuild – A Sika Company are the UK and Ireland’s largest manufacturer of sealants, adhesives, DIY products, powders and building chemicals. Everbuild are proud to be home to the trade’s most respected products which have been enhanced over the years by class-leading research and facilities. With unique technology including i-Cure and Active Resin Technology, Everbuild’s product development activity is relentlessly setting industry standards at the highest quality and leading the field in solving the problems of the future, today.
